blocks.text: `mwsdbridge` and `project` are local projection adapters, not provider runtime execution owners.

items: `mwsdbridge` is the anti-corruption layer for the macmini-workspace daemon socket contract.
`project` builds the Riido workspace projection and syncs projected tasks into the public task DB shape.
Project sync feeds task rows and diagnostics; it does not own provider sessions, SaaS transport, or runtime scheduling.
